article_title: 认识你的 Agent Harness：用 Microsoft Agent Framework 三步搭建个人理财助手
core_theme: 用 Microsoft Agent Framework 的 harness 三步构建一个带自定义工具、网页搜索和计划能力的 agent——chat client -> harness -> console
reader_takeaway: 理解 agent harness 的核心概念，能照着三步流程构建一个带有自定义工具、网页搜索和计划模式的 agent
summary_angle: 三步搭建 agent：构造 chat client → 包装成 harness → 跑在交互式控制台，展示从零到可运行的完整路径

information_blocks.source_anchor: Step 1 – Construct a chat client，用 Microsoft Foundry + Responses API 创建 IChatClient；原文 Step 1 章节
information_blocks.visual_idea: 第一个 panel 展示 chat client 连接到 AI 模型的初始化过程

information_blocks.source_anchor: Step 2 – Turn the chat client into a harness，用 AsHarnessAgent 包装，注入 instructions 和自定义工具；原文 Step 2 章节
information_blocks.visual_idea: 第二个 panel 展示 harness 将 chat client 包装起来，附加 tool、web search、planning 三个模块

information_blocks.source_anchor: Step 3 – Run it through the harness console，用 HarnessConsole 运行交互式终端；原文 Step 3 章节
information_blocks.visual_idea: 第三个 panel 展示终端交互界面，agent 响应查询并显示 /todos 和 plan mode

information_blocks.source_anchor: How plan mode works — PlanningResponse 结构化输出驱动 clarification/approval 两种模式；原文 How plan mode works 章节
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右下角标注 plan mode 的核心机制：结构化 JSON schema 约束 model 输出为 clarification 或 approval

main_metaphor: agent 构建像组装一台精密机械——chat client 是引擎，harness 是传动系统，console 是操控台
primary_subject: 一台由三个核心模块组成的 mechanical agent 构造示意：左侧 chat client 引擎、中段 harness 传动系统、右侧 console 操控台
subject_action: 三个模块依次连接，数据从引擎流向传动系统再到操控台，展示 agent 的构建流程
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: science-fiction mecha concept illustration, mechanical forms, hard-surface details, cockpit-scale cues, cool industrial palette
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，从风格池随机选中；agent harness 构建流程适合用机甲组装的机械感来表达模块组装和流水线概念
style_safety_note: 使用泛科幻机甲描述，不涉及具体作品、工作室或艺术家
draft_goal: 验证三步流程的机甲风格表达是否清晰，三个模块是否能在宽画面中可读
revision_targets: 三个模块的比例和间距
机械风格是否与编辑器插图基础风格和谐
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration that summarizes the article. Theme: Building an agent harness with Microsoft Agent Framework in 3 steps -- chat client, harness wrapper, interactive console. The reader should quickly understand the three-step build process.

Summary angle: Three-step agent building: construct a chat client -> wrap it into a harness with tools and planning -> run through an interactive console.
Narrative flow: 3-beat process. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject and 4 supporting narrative beats.
Information blocks:
- Step 1: Chat client connecting to AI model, labeled 'Chat Client' with marker 1
- Step 2: Harness wrapping the client with tools, web search, and planning modules, labeled 'Harness 包装' with marker 2
- Step 3: Interactive terminal console running the agent, labeled '交互运行' with marker 3
- Mechanism: Plan mode using structured JSON schema for clarification/approval, labeled 'Plan 模式' with '2 mode'

Main metaphor: Agent building as mechanical assembly -- chat client is the engine, harness is the drivetrain, console is the cockpit.
Subject: A mechanical agent assembly composed of three core modules: chat client engine on the left, harness drivetrain in the middle, console cockpit on the right, with data flowing through each stage.
Composition/framing: diagonal forward flow, three modules arranged left-to-right with slight upward trajectory.
Style/medium: combine editorial technical illustration with science-fiction mecha concept illustration, mechanical forms, hard-surface details, cockpit-scale cues, cool industrial palette. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: dark blue-gray, cool silver, warm orange.
Visible text policy: allow only 4 short Chinese/English labels as specified. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels, no fake chart axes, no fake architecture node names.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics, no unrelated icon collage, no decorative clutter.
Avoid: floating chips, neon skyscraper backgrounds, generic robots, fake dashboard axes, fake architecture node names, code rain, HUD overlays, cyberpunk purple-blue light pollution, UI screenshots.
